_note: Static team corrections. Committed to git. Read-only at runtime — add entries here, not in data/learnings.json.

corrections.correction: Button publisher has a known implementation limitation: they cannot detect the purchase page, so they fire SDK calls early in the user journey before a purchase is confirmed. This means Button sessions are NOT post-transaction — high session counts with low fill rate are expected behavior, not a signal failure. Button is excluded from the Pulse fill rate signal.
